derived.causal_summary: Standardize all mcp-* skills into the install-guide and doctor system: finish the mcp-figma 1.0.0.0 version bump, bring mcp-open-design to install/doctor parity, add read-only doctor.sh to mcp-chrome-devtools and mcp-click-up, wire all mcp skills into the central doctor command, and make the three design skills (mcp-figma, mcp-open-design, sk-interface-design) consistently cross-referenced in each other and the repo READMEs.
